Comment: deploy LINE area name resolution + district label in approval prompt

commands: for f in intake_server __main__ area_resolution test_area_resolution compose; do :; done
sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && docker compose --env-file .env config --quiet'
sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && docker compose --env-file .env up -d --no-deps --build line-relay ocr-worker'

sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && for svc in line-relay ocr-worker; do c=election-${svc}-1; for i in $(seq 1 30); do status=$(docker inspect --format "{{if .State.Health}}{{.State.Health.Status}}{{else}}{{.State.Status}}{{end}}" $c 2>/dev/null || echo missing); echo $svc=$status; if [ "$status" = "healthy" ] || [ "$status" = "running" ]; then break; fi; sleep 2; done; done'
sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && docker compose exec -T line-relay python -m unittest hermes.governor_results.test_area_resolution -v'

sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && docker compose exec -T line-relay python - <<"PY"
from pathlib import Path
from hermes.governor_results.area_resolution import parse_area_id_from_text, format_area_label
from unittest.mock import patch, MagicMock
lookup = MagicMock()
lookup.resolve_area_id.return_value = "3"
lookup.format_area_label.return_value = "area-label-ok"
with patch("hermes.governor_results.area_resolution.get_district_lookup", return_value=lookup):
    assert parse_area_id_from_text("area 3") == "3"
    assert format_area_label("3") == "area-label-ok"
source = Path("/app/hermes/governor_results/area_resolution.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
assert "parse_area_id_from_text" in source
print("VERIFY_OK")
PY'
sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && docker compose exec -T line-relay /bin/sh -lc "env | grep RESULTS_API_DISTRICTS_URL"'
